_comment: Gold Q&A over evals/corpus. 'answerable' questions name the substring the answer must contain and the doc it must come from; relevant chunks for retrieval scoring are derived at runtime as chunks of expected_doc containing expected_substring. 'refusal' questions are not answerable from the corpus and must produce the refusal text, with no citations.
refusal_text: I could not find that in your documents.

questions.question: What is the wind and hail deductible?
What is the building limit of insurance?
What is the waiting period for business income coverage?
What happens if the building is vacant for more than 60 consecutive days?
questions.expected_substring: vandalism and water damage losses are not covered

questions.question: What is the estimated annual payroll for Harbor Light Brewing?
What general aggregate limit is requested on the application?
How many square feet is the brewery building?
What is the largest single loss on the loss run?
What is the posted reserve on the open claim?
How often should sprinkler control valves be inspected?
How far should outdoor pallet storage be from the building wall?
What clear zone is required for hot work permits?
What is the directors and officers liability premium?
Who is the workers compensation carrier?
When does the building lease expire?
How many fire extinguishers are required in the warehouse?
